name: morning_brief
description: Weather-less morning brief: reminders due today, yesterday summary, and task queue status — delivered spoken

steps.description: Pull yesterday's notes and daily summaries from memory
Recall open loops, commitments, and recent household context

Compose a concise spoken morning brief (under 90 seconds when read aloud). Cover three sections only: (1) reminders due today — use any reminder context available or say none known, (2) yesterday's summary from memory results, (3) current task queue status (active/queued/blocked). Warm and efficient; skip empty sections in one short clause. Do not invent weather.
